headline: Bitcoin Plunges Toward $58K Amid USD Yen Surge

article.title: Bitcoin price risks drop below $58K as US dollar hits 40-year high against yen
article.summary: Bitcoin faced downside pressure as the US dollar hit its highest levels against the Japanese yen since 1986, while BTC price analysis revealed "capitulation" by 2025 top-buyers.

headline: Bitcoin Miners' Grid Access Surges 30% Amid AI Demand

article.title: AI’s power crunch turns Bitcoin miners’ grid access into an asset
article.summary: Bitcoin miners have the power sites AI companies need, but turning old mining campuses into real data center revenue is no easy pivot.

headline: ECB Holds Off Rate Hike Amid Stable Energy

article.title: ECB’s Dolenc Sees No Urgency to Hike If Energy Markets Stay Calm
article.summary: The European Central Bank may be able to keep interest rates unchanged at its next meeting if the situation in the Middle East doesn’t escalate in the meantime, according to Governing Council member Primoz Dolenc.

headline: $90M Lost to Insider Trades: Susquehanna Reveals Loss

article.title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
article.summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.

headline: Circle Plunges 10% on USD Stablecoin Launch
